CONTENT.Club career: Born in Paris, Cissé began his career at Tours. He made his professional debut on 6 October 2014 in a Ligue 2 match against Brest. He started the game and played the full 90 minutes in a 2–0 away loss.On 12 July 2018, Cissé signed with Ligue 1 side Angers.On 1 September 2021, he joined Caen on a two-year contract.On 13 June 2023, he joined Ferencváros.On 20 April 2024, the Ferencváros–Kisvárda tie ended with a goalless draw at the Groupama Aréna on the 29th match day of the 2023–24 Nemzeti Bajnokság I season which meant that Ferencváros won their 35th championship.On 15 May 2024, Ferencváros were defeated by Paks 2–0 in the 2024 Magyar Kupa Final at the Puskás Aréna.
CONTENT.Personal life: Cissé was born in France and is of Senegalese descent.

SUMMARY: Ibrahim Cissé (born 2 May 1996) is a French professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Nemzeti Bajnokság I club Ferencváros.
